scripts.build:demo: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_IS_REAL_PROD=false NEXT_PUBLIC_METADATA_BASE=https://demo.kumanichi-gr-career.com/ next build && rimraf out/404.html out/404 && node scripts/prune-export.mjs
scripts.build:prod: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_IS_REAL_PROD=true NEXT_PUBLIC_METADATA_BASE=https://kumanichi-gr-career.com/ next build && rimraf out/404.html out/404 && node scripts/prune-export.mjs
